PROP-01b-partial-inv-013.text: Price must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals before storage regardless of feed decimals.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-013.assertion: forall transmit(report): stored_price == raw_price * 10^(18 - feedDecimals) when feedDecimals < 18

locations.note: decimal scaling logic at lines 167-171: multiply if feedDecimals < PRICE_DECIMALS, divide otherwise
